parameter.name: source
parameter.description: Source JDK version for compilation; changing it can change generated bytecode or compilation success

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: Target JDK version for compiled bytecode; changing it changes generated bytecode

parameter.name: release
parameter.description: JDK release version (combines source and target); changing it changes generated bytecode and API compatibility

parameter.name: encoding
parameter.description: Source file encoding; changing it can change parsed source and generated bytecode

parameter.name: debug
parameter.description: Include debugging information in compiled bytecode; changing it changes artifact contents

parameter.name: debuglevel
parameter.description: Level of debugging information (lines, vars, source); changing it changes artifact contents

parameter.name: optimize
parameter.description: Optimize compiled bytecode; changing it changes artifact contents

parameter.name: compilerArgs
parameter.description: Additional compiler arguments; changing them can change generated bytecode or compilation success

parameter.name: compilerArgument
parameter.description: Single additional compiler argument; changing it can change generated bytecode or compilation success

parameter.name: annotationProcessorPaths
parameter.description: Classpath for annotation processors; changing it can change generated sources or compilation success

parameter.name: annotationProcessors
parameter.description: Annotation processors to run; changing them can change generated sources or compilation success

parameter.name: proc
parameter.description: Annotation processing mode (none, only, proc); changing it can change generated sources or compilation success

parameter.name: executable
parameter.description: Path to javac executable; changing it can change the compiler output or compilation success

parameter.name: parameters
parameter.description: Generate metadata for method parameters; changing it changes bytecode contents

parameter.name: enablePreview
parameter.description: Enable preview features; changing it can change generated bytecode or compilation success

parameter.name: verbose
parameter.description: Verbose compiler output

parameter.name: showWarnings
parameter.description: Show compilation warnings (can change the build outcome with failOnWarning)

parameter.name: showDeprecation
parameter.description: Show deprecation warnings (can change the build outcome with failOnWarning)

parameter.name: skipMain
parameter.description: Skip compiling main sources; changing it changes whether main bytecode is produced

parameter.name: failOnError
parameter.description: Fail build on compilation error (changes the build outcome)

parameter.name: failOnWarning
parameter.description: Fail build on compilation warning (changes the build outcome)

parameter.name: fork
parameter.description: Fork compiler into separate process (can change the compiler, output, or outcome)

parameter.name: maxmem
parameter.description: Maximum memory for compiler process (can change the build outcome)

parameter.name: meminitial
parameter.description: Initial memory for compiler process (can change the build outcome)

parameter.name: compilerReuseStrategy
parameter.description: Strategy for reusing compiler instances

parameter.name: forceJavacCompilerUse
parameter.description: Force use of javac compiler; changing it can affect compiler output

parameter.name: staleMillis
parameter.description: Staleness check interval for incremental compilation (can change generated files)

parameter.name: useIncrementalCompilation
parameter.description: Enable incremental compilation (can change generated files and build outcome)

parameter.name: source
parameter.description: Source JDK version for test compilation; changing it can change generated test bytecode or compilation success

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: Target JDK version for compiled test bytecode; changing it changes generated test bytecode

parameter.name: release
parameter.description: JDK release version for tests; changing it changes generated test bytecode and API compatibility

parameter.name: encoding
parameter.description: Test source file encoding; changing it can change parsed source and generated test bytecode

parameter.name: debug
parameter.description: Include debugging information in test bytecode; changing it changes artifact contents

parameter.name: debuglevel
parameter.description: Level of debugging information for tests; changing it changes artifact contents

parameter.name: optimize
parameter.description: Optimize test bytecode; changing it changes artifact contents

parameter.name: compilerArgs
parameter.description: Additional compiler arguments; changing them can change generated bytecode or compilation success for tests

parameter.name: compilerArgument
parameter.description: Single additional compiler argument; changing it can change generated bytecode or compilation success for tests

parameter.name: annotationProcessorPaths
parameter.description: Classpath for test annotation processors; changing it can change generated test sources or compilation success

parameter.name: annotationProcessors
parameter.description: Annotation processors for tests; changing them can change generated test sources or compilation success

parameter.name: proc
parameter.description: Annotation processing mode for tests; changing it can change generated test sources or compilation success

parameter.name: executable
parameter.description: Path to javac for test compilation; changing it can change compiler output or compilation success

parameter.name: parameters
parameter.description: Generate metadata for test method parameters; changing it changes bytecode contents

parameter.name: enablePreview
parameter.description: Enable preview features for tests; changing it can change generated bytecode or compilation success

parameter.name: verbose
parameter.description: Verbose test compiler output

parameter.name: showWarnings
parameter.description: Show test compilation warnings (can change the build outcome with failOnWarning)

parameter.name: showDeprecation
parameter.description: Show test deprecation warnings (can change the build outcome with failOnWarning)

parameter.name: skip
parameter.description: Skip test compilation; changing it changes whether test bytecode is produced

parameter.name: failOnError
parameter.description: Fail build on test compilation error (changes the build outcome)

parameter.name: failOnWarning
parameter.description: Fail build on test compilation warning (changes the build outcome)

parameter.name: fork
parameter.description: Fork test compiler process (can change the compiler, output, or outcome)

parameter.name: maxmem
parameter.description: Maximum memory for test compiler (can change the build outcome)

parameter.name: meminitial
parameter.description: Initial memory for test compiler (can change the build outcome)

parameter.name: compilerReuseStrategy
parameter.description: Compiler reuse strategy for tests

parameter.name: forceJavacCompilerUse
parameter.description: Force javac for test compilation; changing it can affect compiler output

parameter.name: staleMillis
parameter.description: Staleness check for test incremental compilation (can change generated files)

parameter.name: useIncrementalCompilation
parameter.description: Enable incremental test compilation (can change generated files and build outcome)
